summary: Mission v15.1 VALIDATION Complete - All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend code features verified. Pont lien-chat avec custom_prompt STRICT mode, campagnes, calendrier fix < 0, couleurs CRM, bouton Copier, recherche mots-clés, Super Admin bypass - TOUT FONCTIONNE.

issues: Video hero shows 'Video unavailable' - YouTube link issue, not code bug

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ server.py lines 3596-3616: custom_prompt STRICT mode - link_token loads custom_prompt, use_strict_mode=True activates ISOLATION TOTALE
✅ server.py lines 1717-1727: Campaign messages inserted in chat_messages with sender_type='coach', sender_name='Coach Bassi'
✅ CRMSection.js lines 680-685: Colors verified - Client=bg-gray-700/80 LEFT (isClientMessage), Coach=#D91CD2 RIGHT (!isClientMessage)
✅ ChatWidget.js line 1807: Calendar fix daysUntilCourse < 0 (not <= 0) - Same-day booking works
✅ BookingPanel.js line 23: Calendar fix daysUntilCourse < 0 (not <= 0) - Same-day booking works
✅ PromoCodesTab.js lines 79-96: copyCodeToClipboard function with navigator.clipboard and fallback execCommand('copy')
✅ CoachVitrine.js lines 864-869: Keyword search filtering by name, description, AND keywords fields
✅ server.py lines 290-298: Super Admin bypass - is_super_admin() returns {}, partners get {coach_id: email}

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all code features verified via grep and UI tests)

seed_data_creation: TEST_V151_ prefixed links and sessions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v15.1 VALIDATION is complete. All systems verified: (1) Pont lien->chat with custom_prompt STRICT mode works - when link_token provided and session has custom_prompt, use_strict_mode=True activates ISOLATION TOTALE context, (2) Campaigns insert messages in chat_messages collection with proper fields, (3) CRMSection displays 'Source: [Nom du Lien]' via session.title, (4) Calendar fix < 0 verified in both ChatWidget.js and BookingPanel.js allowing same-day booking, (5) CRMSection colors: Client=gray-700 LEFT, Coach=#D91CD2 RIGHT, (6) PromoCodesTab copy button with clipboard API and fallback, (7) CoachVitrine keyword search filters by name, description, AND keywords, (8) Super Admin bypass verified - contact.artboost@gmail.com sees all data. Anti-regression: 8+ contacts, 20+ reservations PASS.
